title: pleopeltis hammatisora
intro: Pleopeltis hammatisora, also known as the "resurrection fern", is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis hammatisora include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
